speaker: project owner
purpose: Regression fixture for the offline human-meow audio classifier and response policy.
consent: The project owner explicitly authorized retaining this recording in the public project repository on 2026-07-19.
rights: Included for this project's testing with the recorded speaker's consent. The speaker retains voice and personality rights; this recording is not granted as training data or as a general-purpose voice asset under the repository software license.
privacy: This fixture contains the adult project owner's voice. It does not contain the owner's daughter or another child's voice.
notes: The untrimmed fixture deliberately preserves headphone warm-up/cue audio and trailing silence so detector behavior remains reproducible. Some vocal peaks clip.
calibration_summary: The strict Meow > 10% rule catches 5 of 12 VAD events (41.7%); the owner-approved Music and Mantra alternatives bring this fixture to 7 of 12 possible reflexes (58.3%). Misses are acceptable by design.
